purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Suming insect infantry multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic chitin, old iron, insect-wax, blackstone, frost, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The locked Suming/Qingming white-wing-over-black-sun emblem may appear only as a tiny copied physical plaque, wax stamp, carapace brand, or door tag, never as a new insect logo, banner, large badge, or altered emblem.
must_have: The infantry must be clearly non-human and non-humanoid
2.0 to 2.3 meter in-world scale must read through proportions while staying lower-tier than Li Tang

low-crouched body, hardened chest and back carapace, narrow compound eyes, bone-white mandible guard, short spear or hook-sickle, folding short forearm blades, reverse-jointed legs, clawed feet, and layered back wing-plates must all be visible
status differences come from patrol, convoy/gate, and pursuit body language plus wax binding count and weapon choice
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: human soldier, man in insect armor, helmeted human, humanoid warrior, samurai armor, knight armor, martial arts villain robe, complete cloth uniform, human face, human hair, normal human legs, human boots, oversized commander silhouette, Li Tang duplicate, elite boss monster, command token, high-rank back-carapace marks, Bai Yi official robe, high cylindrical Qingming hat, white official costume, elegant upper-caste insect, near-human official face, full human cloak, mecha insect, cyberpunk, sci-fi armor, generic fantasy monster, giant insect swarm, gore, blood-soaked horror, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect crest, large banner badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, high-magic aura, spell circle, oversaturated game art

input_images.role: locked Suming/Qingming emblem reference; use only as tiny copied physical rank tag, wax seal, carapace brand, or door tag
locked symbol system reference for institutional plaque, wax seal, carapace brand, and military tag logic
insect-wax, bone-white, membrane, and institutional material reference
upper-caste insect official contrast; infantry must not inherit official robe or near-human face
high-ranking combat insect contrast; infantry must stay lower-tier, smaller, more mass-reusable

prompts.image_prompt: Create one single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board for Suming insect infantry soldier from the series Severed Homeland. Use the project references for low-magic eastern epic style, Suming/Qingming institutional materials, the locked white-wing-over-black-sun emblem, black-green chitin, old iron, insect-wax, blackstone, and snowline frost. Do not redesign any badge. The subject is a lower-tier military unit used by the War-Armor Office and local purge teams, not a commander, not an elite boss, not Bai Yi, and not Li Tang. It must be clearly non-human and non-humanoid: 2.0 to 2.3 meter in-world scale, low-crouched strong disciplined body, hardened chest and back carapace, black-green or deep-brown chitin, narrow dark compound eyes along the sides of the front brow, bone-white mandible guard covering mouthparts, dark flexible neck membrane, two main arms that carry short spear or hook-sickle, short foldable forearm blades on the outer forearms, long reverse-jointed legs, clawed feet, and small degenerated hard wings transformed into layered back armor plates. Show three full-body states that preserve one continuous infantry identity: 1) village-seal patrol state, upright low-crouch guard stance, short spear vertical, black-green/deep-brown carapace, single insect-wax white joint binding, old iron chest strap, small rough War-Armor Office door tag, tiny white-wing-over-black-sun brand copied from the locked emblem only as a physical iron or wax mark; 2) convoy and granary gate state, slightly broader guarded stance, hook-sickle or short polearm, more old iron harness around chest and back, two insect-wax white binding strips at elbows and knees, coarse dark-green command cord, wax seal fragments, clean disciplined equipment, no cloth uniform; 3) pursuit lunge state, lower fast forward pose, short forearm blades extended, spear reversed as secondary weapon, reverse-jointed legs braced, mandible guard tense, compound-eye glints, back wing plates compressed, still a rank-and-file soldier and not Li Tang-level commander. Include silent detail panels with no text: narrow compound eyes and bone-white mandible guard; folded and deployed short forearm blade mechanism; old iron harness and dark-green cord; tiny locked-emblem brand on iron tag or wax seal without redesign; insect-wax white joint bindings and cracked wax texture; layered back wing plates as armor; reverse-jointed leg and clawed foot; short spear and hook-sickle heads; material swatch strip for black-green chitin, deep-brown chitin, bone-white mandible guard, insect-wax white bindings, old iron, dark-green cord, tiny cold-gold pin, restrained dark-red blade scratch, blackstone snow dust. Keep the image as a clean production reference board, not a poster and not a monster horde. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark. Tactile realistic chitin, iron, wax, frost, and blackstone; restrained cinematic lighting; low-magic eastern epic; not glossy sci-fi, not high fantasy.
prompts.negative_prompt: human soldier, man in insect armor, helmeted human, humanoid warrior, samurai armor, knight armor, martial arts villain robe, complete cloth uniform, human face, human hair, normal human legs, human boots, oversized commander silhouette, Li Tang duplicate, elite boss monster, command token, high-rank back-carapace marks, Bai Yi official robe, high cylindrical Qingming hat, white official costume, elegant upper-caste insect, near-human official face, full human cloak, mecha insect, cyberpunk, sci-fi armor, generic fantasy monster, giant insect swarm, gore, blood-soaked horror, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect crest, large banner badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, high-magic aura, spell circle, oversaturated game art
